notes: It runs almost perfectly out of the box. Had to set PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 for the course to be visible (without that, transparent ball rolled on invisible track). Smooth 60fps on lowest settings + 1366x768 resolution. No screen tearing. Xfce 4.13 (tested both compiz and built-in compositor). Only other issue is that it does not quit gracefully (run "pkill Marble" in terminal to easily close it).
title: Marble It Up!

notes: Runs perfectly without any setup on Ubuntu. Performance is comparable to running natively on Windows. Only caveat is having to coax the game to close upon quitting, but it should go away after a few seconds.
title: RACE On

notes: No tweaks. Quits successfully upon exit. Runs like native
title: Marble It Up!

notes: Runs perfectly out of the box, nothing really to note.
title: Marble It Up!
